captions_normal: Worker standing safely away from the edge with guardrails in place.
Worker climbing a ladder with both hands and one foot in contact at all times.
Worker on a fully assembled and secured scaffold with proper guardrails.
Worker walking carefully on a dry, clearly marked and non-slip surface.
Worker standing in a clear zone away from overhead material storage areas.
Worker operating equipment at a safe and regulated distance from power lines.
Worker using an extension cord in good condition with fully intact wires.
Worker using properly insulated and secured electrical wiring connections.
Worker using a fully functional and regularly inspected power tool.
Worker using a fibreglass ladder at a safe distance from electrical sources.
captions_anomalous: Worker standing at an unprotected edge.
Worker climbing a ladder without three points of contact.
Worker walking on a wet, slippery surface.
Worker standing under an area with materials overhead.
Worker operating equipment close to overhead power lines.
Worker using an extension cord with damaged wires.
Worker handling temporary electrical wiring connections.
Worker using a damaged or defective power tool.
Worker using a metal ladder close to electricity.
